name: Discord
description: Build bots and integrate with Discord servers. Send messages, manage channels, react to messages, and access guild information through the Discord Bot API.

capabilities.name: send_message
capabilities.description: Send a message to a channel.

capabilities.name: list_guild_channels
capabilities.description: Get all channels in a guild.

capabilities.name: create_channel
capabilities.description: Create a new channel in a guild.

capabilities.name: add_reaction
capabilities.description: Add an emoji reaction to a message.

capabilities.name: create_thread
capabilities.description: Create a thread in a channel.
